finalAssistantMessages.text: The Mushroom nested core moved to `f387670` while I was auditing, titled “Add wallet and roll status view-model helpers”; Meat is still at `786d41c`. I’m refreshing the recommendation against the newer Mushroom core, because that is probably what “current core helpers” refers to.

The current core helper commit already covers `walletPurchaseStatusFromIntent`, `walletPurchaseStatusFromTelegramInvoice`, and `assetRollStatusFromError`, so I’m not recommending another status-normalization slice. The better next step is to move the server-side roll/burn result DTO constructors into the gacha core module, then let the existing client feedback helpers consume the same contract.

No files edited. **1. Recommended Next Slice** Extract **asset gacha roll/burn result DTO shaping** into `backpack-game-core`, probably under `src/asset-gacha.js` and exported through `@microwavedev/backpack-game-core/modules/gacha`. This is the next clean slice after the current core helpers because Mushroom’s current core checkout already has wallet/roll status helpers (`walletPurchaseStatusFromIntent`, `walletPurchaseStatusFromTelegramInvoice`, `assetRollStatusFromError`) in [client-view-model.js](/Users/microwavedev/workspace/microwave-hub/mushroom-master/vendor/backpack-game-core/src/client-view-model.js:571). Inventory/equipment row normalization is also already in core via `normalizeP
